servicesGrid.subheading: We bring the best automotive spa directly to your door.

servicesGrid.ctaBannerDesc: Absolute convenience for you, maximum excellence for your car.

lavado-ecologico.title: Eco Wash
lavado-ecologico.shortDescription: Full wash with interior vacuuming and minimal water waste.
lavado-ecologico.fullDescription: Deep cleaning with interior vacuuming, exterior and interior wash using low-water-consumption technology and biodegradable products. Up to 90% water savings vs. traditional washing.

pulido-abrillantador.title: Paint Polish & Shine
pulido-abrillantador.fullDescription: We restore your vehicle's original shine by eliminating micro-scratches and enhancing color depth using professional-grade paint correction techniques.

pulido-focos.title: Headlight Restoration
pulido-focos.fullDescription: Restore the clarity and safety of your headlights. We eliminate yellowing and haziness with UV sealing that extends the result for up to 12 months.

limpieza-motor.title: Engine Clean
limpieza-motor.fullDescription: Detailed technical cleaning that eliminates accumulated grease and grime, protecting hoses and plastic components without using water. Keep your car's heart in optimal condition.

lavado-tapiz.title: Upholstery Cleaning
lavado-tapiz.shortDescription: Deep restoration of interior and seats.
lavado-tapiz.fullDescription: Deep cleaning of upholstery, seats, and carpets using specialized equipment. We remove stains, odors, and embedded grime, restoring the interior to its original condition.

cta.heading: Book your mobile service today
cta.description: We offer a premium automotive care service, respecting the environment and valuing your time. We serve Santiago and the Metropolitan Region.

contact.heading: Book your mobile wash
contact.description: We bring luxury car care right to your door. Professional equipment and biodegradable products for an impeccable finish without leaving home.

privacidad.heading: Privacy Policy
privacidad.s1Body: When you fill out the contact or booking form on our site, we collect the following information: full name, phone number, service address, vehicle type, preferred date, and selected services. This information is provided voluntarily by the user.
privacidad.s2Intro: The information collected is used exclusively to:
privacidad.s2Li1: Coordinate and confirm the requested service.
privacidad.s2Li2: Contact you to verify availability and service details.
privacidad.s2Li3: Send you communications related to your booking.
privacidad.s2Footer: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacidad.s3Body: Form data is transmitted securely via encrypted email (SMTP with TLS). We do not store personal information in our own databases beyond the confirmation email received.
privacidad.s4Body: Our site includes a direct link to WhatsApp. By clicking it, you will be redirected to the WhatsApp application, whose use is subject to WhatsApp's Privacy Policy.
privacidad.s5Body: You have the right to request access, rectification, or deletion of your personal data at any time. To do so, contact us directly at
privacidad.s6Body: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication on this page.

terminos.heading: Terms and Conditions
terminos.s1Body: By using the Detailing Marin website and requesting any of our services, you accept these terms and conditions in their entirety. If you disagree with any part, please do not use our services.
terminos.s2Body: Detailing Marin offers mobile automotive detailing and cleaning services across Santiago and the Metropolitan Region. Services include eco wash with interior vacuuming, polishing, headlight treatment, and engine cleaning, among others described on our site.
terminos.s3Body: Bookings made through the web form or WhatsApp are service requests subject to availability. A booking is considered confirmed only when a Detailing Marin representative explicitly validates it in writing (via WhatsApp or email).
terminos.s4Body: If you need to cancel or reschedule a service, please notify us at least 24 hours in advance. Late cancellations may be subject to a 20% charge of the service value to cover travel costs.
terminos.s5Li1: Providing access to the vehicle at the agreed date and location.
terminos.s5Li2: Informing us in advance about pre-existing damage to the paint or other surfaces.
terminos.s5Li3: Removing valuables from the vehicle interior before the service.
terminos.s6Body: Detailing Marin is not liable for undisclosed pre-existing damage or weather conditions that prevent proper service execution. In the event of damage caused directly by our operation, we commit to evaluating and resolving the incident directly with the client.
terminos.s7Body: Prices published on the site are indicative in Chilean pesos (CLP) and may vary depending on the vehicle's condition, size, and additional services requested. The final price is confirmed before the service begins. Payment is made upon completion of the work.
terminos.s8Body: Detailing Marin reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will be published on this page and will take effect immediately.
terminos.s9Prefix: For questions about these terms, you can contact us at
